category_sources: source_facts.description says text classification with Bayesian, LSI, Logistic Regression, and kNN; official Ruby Classifier site describes text classification and semantic analysis.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is rubyclassifier.com; official site header uses Ruby Classifier.
docs_sources: Official Ruby Classifier site provides /docs; official site also links to RubyDoc API documentation for the classifier gem.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
